ai_role_reasoning: Standard data architecture and technical leadership work; no signals of AI tool usage or AI-enabled infrastructure.

testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate owns quality practices through ownership verbs ('maintain', 'drive improvements') paired with quality/standards domains.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Maintain... operational excellence... Manage technical debt and enable sustainable evolution
